caddy = (extendable-proxy)
caddy.reverse_proxy.{blocks\.proxy_target} =
caddy.reverse_proxy.{blocks\.proxy_options} =

caddy_1 = localhost
caddy_1.dynamic_dns.provider = cloudflare token123
caddy_1.dynamic_dns.domains.mydomain\.fr =
----------
(extendable-proxy) {
	reverse_proxy {
		{blocks.proxy_options}
		{blocks.proxy_target}
	}
}
localhost {
	dynamic_dns {
		domains {
			mydomain.fr
		}
		provider cloudflare token123
	}
}
